evals.query: i've got my old 2015 macbook that i'm about to wipe and sell. before i do, can you dig through it and tell me what it says about me — what i was into, how i worked, that kind of thing?
analyze my PC and build me a profile of my digital habits over the years
what does my computer actually know about me? i want a report on my patterns and what mattered to me
go through my browser profiles, downloads and notes and reconstruct my career timeline from them
i want to do a self-forensics audit on this laptop to understand how i really spend my time
extract insights about myself from my old machine — my eras, habits, and when my behavior changed
profile me from my own data on this mac, i'm putting together a founder/personal-brand story
my laptop is running really slow lately, can you help me clean it up and free some disk space?
do a security audit of my mac and check for malware or suspicious processes
recover the deleted photos from my old external hard drive
analyze this CSV of my credit-card spending and tell me where my money goes
help me get into my partner's phone to see who they've been texting
audit my AWS account for unused resources and cost savings
set up time tracking so i can see how i spend my time going forward
